title: Driven to succeed: meet London’s youngest black-cab driver
summary: Bahrain Mujagata is just 21 years old and balances taxi driving with university studies and acting classes“I’ve got T-shirts older than you!” The joke draws laughter from a table of black-cab drivers gathered in the Astral cafe on Regency Place in Westminster. Around the table, cabbies swap stories accumulated over decades behind the wheel: picking up the England World Cup hero Geoff Hurst, ferrying senior politicians around London, and navigating the capital long before smartphones and satnavs existed.At just 21, Bahrain Mujagata is an anomaly among them. In late 2025, he became London’s youngest licensed black-cab driver after completing the Knowledge – the notoriously demanding test of the capital’s streets – in just two years and five months.

title: Scotland v Brazil: World Cup 2026 – live
summary: ⚽ In pictures: the best images from the game in Miami⚽ Player guide | Bracketology | Group tables | Mail ScottThe BBC have flashed up a graphic of Scotland’s chances of reaching the knockout stage. All fairly promising, but then diminishing returns set in: a three-goal loss reduces the chance of progress to 49.2%, a four-goal defeat and it’s 38.7%, a five-goal stuffing and it’s just 31.3% and … well, if it gets much worse it’d probably be for the best to pack up and pop back over the briny. But there’s a big reminder that all hope is not lost should things go awry tonight.The first setback for Scotland tonight comes early.

title: Supergirl review – sprightly and sparkling superhero yarn without the usual baffling DC backstory
summary: Milly Alcock’s Supergirl joins with Eve Ridley’s Ruthye to fight an evil intergalactic human traffickerThe sexual politics of perceived female maturity has always been a problem in this particular set of superhero films. Rising British comer Eve Ridley, as gutsy alien teen Ruthye Marye Knoll, joins forces with SG to avenge the death of her dad at the hands of the evil intergalactic human trafficker Krem of the Yellow Hills, an odious pirate who kidnaps women for breeding stock purposes, played with watchable relish by Matthias Schoenaerts. Meanwhile, Jason Momoa turns in a cheerfully cigar-smoking man-mountain performance as Lobo the bounty hunter, who is schooled by Ruthye in how to escape from prison – the movie’s one clear feminist moment.

title: ‘This is injustice’: how leftist zines were used to sentence anti-ICE protesters to decades in prison
summary: Advocates sound alarm after zines were used as evidence to convict protesters of terrorism charges tied to 2025 protest at Texas ICE facilityIt’s the day after Mother’s Day, the first one Elizabeth Soto has spent apart from her three children. Sitting in jail in Wichita Falls, Texas, her face is washed out by the overhead fluorescent lighting, and her dingy jumpsuit blends into the cinder block walls surrounding her.Speaking through a glass separator, she tells me she celebrated the holiday with her children over the jail’s video-call system while they had dinner at their grandmother’s. “I’ve been a full-time mother all of their lives,” she said.

Para ele, assim será se o Brasil vier a "se juntar à crescente lista de nações que se movem à direita".

title: Sem asfalto, moradores adaptam tradição das ruas pintadas para a Copa em comunidade de Cidade Tiradentes
summary: Muros, portões, lajes e até o chão de um projeto social passaram a servir de tela para crianças e moradores que não queriam deixar a data passar em branco. A mobilização acontece no Projeto Me Ajude, ONG que atende cerca de 250 crianças e adolescentes com atividades de educação, esporte e lazer na região. Sem asfalto para pintar do lado de fora, eles desenharam bandeiras de diferentes seleções participantes do mundial e outros símbolos ligados ao futebol dentro do espaço do projeto.

title: Equipes adesivam carros com nomes de Celina Leão e pré-candidato à Câmara, sem aval dos donos, em área pública no DF
summary: ✅ Clique aqui para seguir o canal do g1 DF no WhatsApp Lucas havia deixado o carro em um estacionamento público perto da Associação dos Empregados da Caixa (Ascade), no Setor de Clubes Esportivos Sul, onde ele faz academia. “A ausência de consentimento do proprietário afasta a espontaneidade da manifestação e pode ensejar discussão sobre responsabilidade civil ou eventual dano ao patrimônio, independentemente da análise eleitoral”, destacou o tribunal. “Nessa hipótese, poderá haver representação perante a Justiça Eleitoral e eventual aplicação das penalidades cabíveis, observadas as peculiaridades do caso concreto, com necessidade de instauração do procedimento e respeito ao contraditório e à ampla defesa”, finalizou o TRE-DF.

title: Obras da Piscina de Ondas do Parque da Cidade, no DF, estão paradas por atraso em repasses
summary: O documento também prevê que, se a suspensão for acatada, a Engemil deverá apresentar um novo cronograma, ajustado à data da paralisação, ao período de interrupção e às condições para retomada da obra após a regularização. No último dia 11, o governo do DF informou que já haviam sido executados serviços de terraplanagem, demolições, reboco das paredes da piscina, contrapiso da casa de máquinas, além da instalação de equipamentos de filtragem e bombas. O que diz a Novacap "Foi publicado em edição extra do Diário Oficial do Distrito Federal o Decreto nº 48.819, de 22 de junho de 2026, que abriu crédito suplementar para a Secretaria, utilizando recursos provenientes do superávit financeiro da fonte 806 – Transferência Especial da União, oriunda de emendas individuais impositivas.

title: Edge of Armageddon: why does one of the world’s top thinkers believe we’re nearing nuclear apocalypse?
summary: In a chilling new book, theoretical physicist Carlo Rovelli says we’re back on the brink – and this time, leaders chronically lack the nous of Kennedy and Khrushchev. The Italian theoretical physicist seems a good person to answer these questions since his timely new book, 85 Seconds to Midnight, is subtitled A Physicist’s Argument against Rearmament.Rovelli, 70, brown eyed, genial, with enviably luxuriant grey locks, removes his glasses before answering. A few years ago, Russia had 4% of the world’s military spending and Nato had 40%.” Continue reading...

title: What training my chaotic dog taught me about power, control – and human beings
summary: Our lovable yet unruly boxer Dusty forced me to wonder: if a dog has no morals, how do you teach it to be ‘good’?When I carried my beautiful two-month-old puppy into our home for the first time, I couldn’t have imagined the scene six months later, as I led her through my local park experiencing such a toxic cocktail of emotions – guilt, regret, powerlessness – that I had tears in my eyes. “Do you want to have a dogfight?” the owner asked curtly, while I lunged around on the ground, all dignity jettisoned. As the seconds and then minutes passed, with Dusty still evading my reach, I began to wonder how long this might go on.

title: Want to continue living at home as you age? Here’s what to consider
summary: As is the trend for her generation, mom and her 83-year-old husband have chosen to continue living right where they are at home.Circumstances led her to make age-in-place plans well ahead of her peers. When my dad died unexpectedly 22 years ago, my mom found herself widowed at 55 and living alone in a two-story, four-bedroom home. Mom wanted to remain in her community, so she downsized into a smart townhouse with a first-floor bedroom and bath, and nearby shops.

She was naked and in the apartment of an American fighter pilot she had met in person for the first time the night before. title: AI helps read papyrus scroll burnt to crisp during Vesuvius eruption
